full_text:
Fu Kuang (Yuanbi) 輔匡 (元弼)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Kuang (輔匡), styledYuanbi (元弼), was born in Nan. Leader of the vanguard against Wu. Fought under Zhuge Liang against the Nanman. Fu Kuang was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
